title: Pan Seared French Sauerkraut Skillet
description: A hearty, macrobiotic-friendly French dish featuring pan-seared sauerkraut and air-fried ingredients, perfect for a weeknight dinner. This recipe combines grassy and juicy flavors for a delicious meal.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced onion and cook until it is translucent and starting to brown.
Add the sliced carrots and potatoes, and cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the drained sauerkraut, dried thyme, salt, and pepper, and stir to combine.
Reduce the heat to medium-low and cook, covered, for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Use an air fryer to cook the ingredients for an additional 5 minutes, if desired, for a crispy texture.
Serve the pan-seared French sauerkraut skillet hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
